modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Understanding transitions in PowerPoint presentations

full_description_text:  
User asked about transitions in PowerPoint. They wanted to know what a transition is. The conversation was during a live call. The analyst noted the user seemed confused about the feature.
description: User asked about transitions in PowerPoint. They wanted to know what a transition is. The conversation was during a live call. The analyst noted the user seemed confused about the feature.
